nasb.text: Then I was beside Him, as a master workman; And I was daily His delight, Rejoicing always before Him,

esv.text: then I was beside him, like a master workman, and I was daily his  delight, rejoicing before him always,

cnv.text: 那時，我在他身邊作工匠， 每天都充滿喜樂， 時常在他面前歡笑，

ccb.text: 我就在祂身旁， 做祂的工程师， 天天成为祂的喜乐， 终日在祂面前欢悦，

csbs.text: 那时我在他身边为工匠， 是他每天的喜乐， 时时在他面前欢笑，
